parsed.rationale: Trade-weighted broad dollar index (DTWEXBGS) is the cleanest single proxy for USD strength against a basket of currencies. DXY itself is not on FRED, but the broad trade-weighted index captures the same dynamic and is daily.

raw:

```json
{
  "primary_series": "PNGASEUUSDM",
  "rationale": "PNGASEUUSDM is the IMF/World Bank European natural gas price (Dutch TTF proxy) on FRED, monthly. It is the cleanest long-history FRED proxy for European gas benchmark moves. No daily TTF series exists on FRED with deep history.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 3,
  "lookback_years": 35,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: PNGASEUUSDM is the IMF/World Bank European natural gas price (Dutch TTF proxy) on FRED, monthly. It is the cleanest long-history FRED proxy for European gas benchmark moves. No daily TTF series exists on FRED with deep history.

raw:
```json
{
  "primary_series": null,
  "rationale": "FRED does not carry VLCC tanker day-rates or Baltic Dirty Tanker Index series. Closest available proxies (e.g. shipping cost indices) are not in FRED. Recommend sourcing from Clarksons or Baltic Exchange directly. As a very loose macro proxy, one could use DCOILWTICO crack spreads, but that conflates oil price with freight and would mislead analog selection.",
  "threshold_zscore": 2.0,
  "window_obs": 60,
  "lookback_years": 40,
  "direction": "up"
}
```

parsed.rationale: FRED does not carry VLCC tanker day-rates or Baltic Dirty Tanker Index series. Closest available proxies (e.g. shipping cost indices) are not in FRED. Recommend sourcing from Clarksons or Baltic Exchange directly. As a very loose macro proxy, one could use DCOILWTICO crack spreads, but that conflates oil price with freight and would mislead analog selection.
